verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is sunshine in my soul today, More glorious and bright Than glows in any earthly sky, For Jesus is my light.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: O there's sunshine, blessed sunshine, While the peaceful, happy moments roll; When Jesus shows His smiling face There is sunshine in my soul.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There is music in my soul today, A carol to my King; And Jesus, listening, can hear The song I cannot sing.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There is springtime in my soul today, For when the Lord is near The dove of peace sings in my heart, The flowers of grace appear.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There is gladness in my soul today, And hope, and praise, and love, For blessings which He gives me now, For joys laid up above.
